evals.prompt: Add A2A scheduler support to our ADK agent — we need recurring scheduled tasks backed by Spanner and Cloud Tasks. We already have webui, webapi, and weblro launchers wired up.
evals.expected_output: internal/scheduler package with InitScheduler and Service, gRPC server with UnaryServerInterceptor, mux.HandleGRPC, webscheduler.NewLauncher inside web.NewLauncher
assertions: Creates internal/scheduler/scheduler.go with InitScheduler and MustInitScheduler
serviceNeuron const matches infra neuron id
mux.HandleGRPC called with the gRPC server

evals.prompt: Wire the scheduler extension so our agent can handle cron-scheduled invocations via Cloud Tasks; the neuron id is in infra locals.
evals.expected_output: scheduler package wired with correct serviceNeuron from infra, gRPC interceptor, mux registration, and webscheduler sublauncher
assertions: Reads neuron from infra locals for serviceNeuron
Cloud Tasks queue name follows {neuron}-a2a-scheduler pattern
Does not use add-tool or add-lro flows

evals.prompt: Our agent needs the webscheduler sublauncher added. We already have the internal/scheduler package set up with MustInitScheduler. Just wire the entrypoint.
evals.expected_output: Entrypoint-only wiring: gRPC server with interceptor, mux registration, webscheduler sublauncher — no internal/scheduler package creation
